name: secured-source expansion: every shipped convention ruleset is fully grounded in a catalog source
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'Encoding.default_external=Encoding::UTF_8; r=ENV["CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT"]; ids={}; [r+"/standards/cloud-architecture-sources.yaml", r+"/standards/cloud-engineering-sources.yaml", r+"/standards/eo-security-sources.yaml"].each{|f| YAML.unsafe_load_file(f).each{|e| ids[e["id"]]=true}}; bad=[]; Dir[r+"/standards/cloud-conventions/*.yaml"].each{|rf| YAML.unsafe_load_file(rf).each{|x| bad<<x["id"] unless ids[x["source_id"]]}}; exit(bad.empty? ? 0 : 1)' && echo all-grounded 1>&2
